scripts.seed:examKnowledge: python3 scripts/savemyexams/json_to_jsonl.py --input convex/seed_data/exam_knowledge.json --output convex/seed_data/exam_knowledge.jsonl && convex import --table examKnowledge --replace -y convex/seed_data/exam_knowledge.jsonl
scripts.seed:examAll: npm run seed:examCatalog && npm run seed:examKnowledge
